pipelines.name: specify
pipelines.description: Create or update the feature specification from a natural language feature description

pipelines.name: clarify
pipelines.description: Orchestrator-compatible spec clarification using shared question/answer protocol (interactive or batch)

pipelines.name: plan
pipelines.description: Execute the implementation planning workflow using the plan template to generate design artifacts

pipelines.name: tasks
pipelines.description: Generate an actionable, dependency-ordered tasks.md for the feature based on available design artifacts

pipelines.name: analyze
pipelines.description: Perform a non-destructive cross-artifact consistency and quality analysis

pipelines.name: implement
pipelines.description: Execute the implementation plan by processing and executing all tasks defined in tasks.md

pipelines.name: run-tests
pipelines.description: General-purpose test suite executor — runs tests and emits pass/fail signal

pipelines.name: visual-verify
pipelines.description: Browser visual verification — checks DOM structure and visual diff, emits pass/fail signal

pipelines.name: verify-execute
pipelines.description: Verification checklist executor — reads ticket spec, executes checks, emits pass/fail signal

pipelines.name: blindqa
pipelines.description: Blind QA verification against acceptance criteria without prior context

pipelines.name: spec-critique
pipelines.description: Adversarial specification analysis to find gaps and ambiguities before implementation

pipelines.name: cleanup
pipelines.description: Clean up feature branch or worktree after completion

pipelines.name: deploy-verify
pipelines.description: Post-deploy smoke verification — polls production URL, runs smoke routes, emits pass/fail signal

pipelines.name: pre-deploy-confirm
pipelines.description: Pre-deploy confirmation gate — presents deployment summary, waits for explicit user approval

pipelines.name: checklist
pipelines.description: Generate a custom checklist for the current feature based on user requirements

pipelines.name: code-review
pipelines.description: Code review of implementation changes against spec and acceptance criteria

pipelines.name: constitution
pipelines.description: Create or update the project constitution ensuring all dependent templates stay in sync

pipelines.name: dependencies
pipelines.description: Resolve and document project dependencies for the current feature

pipelines.name: taskstoissues
pipelines.description: Convert existing tasks into actionable, dependency-ordered GitHub issues for the feature

pipelines.name: iosbuild
pipelines.description: Build and install iOS app on the simulator for Collab verification

pipelines.name: iosverify
pipelines.description: iOS simulator verification for Collab pipeline

packs.name: backend
packs.description: Backend pipeline variant — spec through implementation and test execution

packs.name: verification
packs.description: Verification pipeline variant — visual, checklist, and blind QA verification

packs.name: frontend-ui
packs.description: Frontend UI pipeline variant — spec through implementation with visual verification

packs.name: deploy
packs.description: Deployment pipeline variant — pre-deploy confirmation through post-deploy verification and cleanup
